article_title: Turning & Starting and Signals On Stopping and Turning
text: No person shall move a vehicle which is stopped, standing, or parked unless and until such movement can be made with reasonable safety.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 28. Turning & Starting and Signals On Stopping and Turning
##### § 1162 — Starting parked vehicle

No person shall move a vehicle which is stopped, standing, or parked unless and until such movement can be made with reasonable safety.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: No person shall move a vehicle which is stopped, standing, or parked unless and until such movement can be made with reasonable safety.
